title: CollectAll - Ores, Trees and Crops
description: A vanilla-friendly mod that has Vein Mining, Tree Chopping, and Crop Harvesting. All in one mod!
body:
**Collect all the ores, tree logs and crops in a single mod.** *** ## 📖Features: - Use a pickaxe to collect all the ores around.

- Use an axe while crouching at the base of the tree.

- Use a hoe to harvest plants grown in a certain area.

- (Extra) Use a hoe to break grass to collect seeds or clear the terrain in a certain area.

*** ## Compatibility - The mod is compatible on ServerSide. - The mod is compatible with trees, ores and crops from other mods, as long as they are registered in the TAGs: ORES, LOGS and CROPS. *** Feel free to add this mod to your modpack. Please do not report issues in the comments.
